hero.title: Emma Kwon
hero.subtitle: A house of music, books, publishing, children's worlds, and designed objects.

houseStatement: Emma Kwon is the house. Music, memoir, publishing, gallery, and children's worlds live inside it as rooms, each carrying her hand.
